title: Lemon Herb Chicken
description: Juicy skillet chicken with bright lemon, garlic, and herbs for a quick weeknight dinner.

data.summary: A fast, savory main built for repeatable weeknight cooking.

steps: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Sear the chicken in olive oil until browned on both sides.
Add garlic, lemon zest, rosemary, and thyme to the pan.
Pour in the lemon juice and stock, then simmer until the chicken is cooked through.
Spoon the pan sauce over the chicken before serving.

items: Serve with roasted potatoes, rice, or a crisp green salad.
Chicken breasts work too, but reduce the simmering time to avoid drying them out.
